heading: Example
body:
The following index definition indexes the `text.sv_FI` field in
the [sample collection](custom-analyzers-eg-coll) collection using a
custom analyzer named `diacriticFolder`. The custom analyzer
specifies the following:

- Apply the [keyword](keyword-tokenizer-ref) to
  tokenize all the terms in the string field as a single term.

- Use the `icuFolding` token filter to apply foldings such as
  accent removal, case folding, canonical duplicates folding, and so
  on.

Atlas UI

Visual Editor

- In the Custom Analyzers section, click Add
  Custom Analyzer.

- Select the Create Your Own radio button and click
  Next.

- Type whitespace in the Analyzer Name field.

- Expand Tokenizer if it's collapsed.

- Select whitespace from the dropdown.

- Expand Token Filters and click 
  Add token filter.

- Select wordDelimiterGraph from the dropdown.

- Click Add token filter to add the token filter to your
  custom analyzer.

- Click Add to create the custom analyzer.

- In the Field Mappings section, click Add
  Field Mapping to apply the custom analyzer on
  the message field.

- Select message from the Field
  Name dropdown and dateFacet from the Data
  Type dropdown.

- In the properties section for the data type, select whitespace
  from the Index Analyzer and Search Analyzer
  dropdowns.

- Click Add, then Save Changes.

JSON Editor

Replace the default index definition with the following example:

```json
{
  "analyzer": "diacriticFolder",
  "mappings": {
    "fields": {
      "text": {
        "type": "document",
        "fields": {
          "sv_FI": {
            "analyzer": "diacriticFolder",
            "type": "string"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "analyzers": [
    {
      "name": "diacriticFolder",
      "charFilters": [],
      "tokenizer": {
        "type": "keyword"
      },
      "tokenFilters": [
        {
          "type": "icuFolding"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

MongoDB Shell

The following query uses the [wildcard](wildcard-ref) operator to search
the `text.sv_FI` field in the [sample collection](custom-analyzers-eg-coll) collection for all terms that contain the
term `avdelning`, preceded and followed by any number of other
characters.

Atlas UI

MongoDB Shell

MongoDB Search returns the document with `_id: 1` and `_id: 2` in the results
because the documents contain the query term `avdelning` followed by
other characters in the document with `_id: 1` and preceded and
followed by other characters in the document with `_id: 2`.
Specifically, MongoDB Search creates the following tokens for the documents in
the results, which it then matches to the query term `*avdelning*`.

| Document ID | Output Tokens                                   |
| ----------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| \_id: 1     | den har sidan behandlar avdelningsmoten         |
| \_id: 2     | forst talade chefen for forsaljningsavdelningen |
